body.title: CLOSED: retire wild_igor shims: budget, filesystem, registry, machine_manager
body.result: rewrote ~127 import sites to lab.utility_closet.*; deleted 4 shims; 4507 tests pass
body.description:
Pass-2 area_5 finding: wild_igor/igor/tools/ has re-export shims for budget.py, filesystem.py, registry.py and cognition/machine_manager.py that just forward to lab.utility_closet.*. Rewrite all call sites to use canonical paths, then delete the shims.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/budget.py, filesystem.py, registry.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/machine_manager.py, all callers (~45 import sites)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — grep callers, rewrite imports to lab.utility_closet.*, delete 4 shim files. OUT — changing any logic in the underlying modules.
**Test plan:** Full test suite passes after import rewrites; `grep -r 'from wild_igor.igor.tools.budget' wild_igor/` returns empty.
**Pass condition:** `python -c "from lab.utility_closet.tools import budget"` succeeds; shim files deleted; tests pass.
